# Ask GoalOS Concierge v60

Ask GoalOS is a browser-local public-site question router. It answers questions from the static route manifest and local doctrine cards, then routes visitors to the right proof page, evidence room, legal boundary, command center, or complete route index.

## Public-safe boundary

- No account.
- No form submission.
- No wallet connection.
- No token approval.
- No network request.
- No analytics.
- No cookies.
- No browser storage.
- No user data retained.
- No production authority.

## Behavior

Normal questions produce a local answer and recommended route cards. Commands such as `open evidence docket`, `go to RSI`, or `show all pages` may navigate to the top matching public route.

## Why this fits GoalOS

The feature converts user intent into a route decision without collecting data. It follows the same institutional law as the rest of the site: objective → proof path → boundary → receipt.
